title: [BUG] Windows service mode: core runs and pipe listens, but UI shows core communication error and proxy groups are empty
author: 1234567mm
body:
### Describe the bug

On Windows, Clash Verge Rev shows **core communication error** in the Home page and the **Proxy page is empty**, even though the Mihomo core is actually running, listening on the mixed proxy port, listening on the named pipe, and forwarding traffic successfully.

This looks like a frontend/backend control-channel issue rather than a core startup or profile parsing failure.

Related existing issues I found:

- #7393: `[BUG] 内核通信错误` (closed)
- #7235: proxy list empty / current node inactive / core communication error after Mihomo core update (closed as duplicate)

My case adds a more specific diagnostic state: after reboot there is only one `verge-mihomo.exe`, the config validates, the service starts the core, the pipe is reported as listening, and proxy traffic is handled, but the UI still reports a communication error and cannot display proxy groups.

### Environment

```text
OS: Windows 10 Home China
Windows version: 2009
Architecture: Windows amd64
Clash Verge Rev: 2.5.1
Core: verge-mihomo
Mihomo version: Mihomo Meta v1.19.28 windows amd64 with go1.26.5, with_gvisor
Running mode: service mode
Service: Clash Verge Service, running as LocalSystem
```

Service information:

```text
Name: clash_verge_service
DisplayName: Clash Verge Service
State: Running
StartMode: Auto
StartName: LocalSystem
PathName: "D:\Program Files\Clash Verge\resources\clash-verge-service.exe"
```

### Current user-visible behavior

- Home page: `当前节点` shows no active proxy node.
- Home page: `代理模式` shows `内核通信错误` / core communication error.
- Proxy page: proxy groups are not visible.
- System proxy is enabled and applications can still send traffic to `127.0.0.1:7897`.
- The core logs show traffic is actually being routed through DIRECT / proxy groups.

### Expected behavior

If the core is running and the named pipe is listening, the UI should be able to read:

- current proxy mode
- proxy groups
- current selected node
- proxy list / group list

If pipe communication fails, the UI should either:

1. fall back to an HTTP external controller when available, or
2. show a precise error explaining whether the failure is service IPC, core IPC, pipe permissions, timeout, or frontend API failure.

### Diagnostic timeline

This issue originally appeared while debugging a separate website compatibility problem. LeetCode/leetcode.cn code editor resources failed when Clash was enabled. During that investigation I changed several settings and found two separate problems.

#### Phase 1: DNS/TUN/LeetCode compatibility investigation

Initial symptoms:

- LeetCode China page opened, but the right-side code editor area sometimes stayed blank.
- Closing Clash/VPN made LeetCode work normally.
- Browser DevTools showed certificate/resource failures for LeetCode static assets, such as:
  - `static.leetcode.cn`
  - `lccdn.leetcode.cn`
  - `assets.leetcode.cn`
- At one point Chrome showed `ERR_CERT_COMMON_NAME_INVALID`.

Configuration changes tested:

- Disabled TUN / virtual NIC mode.
- Disabled automatic global route.
- Disabled strict route.
- Added system proxy bypass entries:

```text
leetcode.cn;*.leetcode.cn
```

- Disabled DNS overwrite.
- Confirmed final runtime DNS changed from `fake-ip` to `redir-host`.

The final runtime config now contains:

```yaml
dns:
  enable: true
  enhanced-mode: redir-host

tun:
  enable: false
```

So the DNS/TUN problem appears to be separated from the remaining core communication problem.

#### Phase 2: temporary duplicate core / port conflict

Before reboot, there were two `verge-mihomo.exe` processes. The service log showed:

```log
External controller pipe listen error: open \\.\pipe\verge-mihomo: Access is denied.
Start Mixed(http+socks) server error: listen tcp :7897: bind: Only one usage of each socket address (protocol/network address/port) is normally permitted.
```

At that time the issue was clearly a duplicate core / stale process / port and pipe conflict.

After a full Windows reboot, that conflict disappeared.

#### Phase 3: state after full reboot

After reboot, there is only one `verge-mihomo.exe` process:

```text
clash-verge-service.exe
clash-core-service.exe
clash-verge.exe
verge-mihomo.exe
```

Port `7897` is listened by the single `verge-mihomo.exe` process:

```text
TCP  0.0.0.0:7897  0.0.0.0:0  LISTENING  verge-mihomo.exe
TCP  [::]:7897     [::]:0     LISTENING  verge-mihomo.exe
UDP  0.0.0.0:7897  *:*        verge-mihomo.exe
UDP  [::]:7897     *:*        verge-mihomo.exe
```

The app log says the runtime config was generated and validated successfully:

```log
[2026-07-14 11:11:47.191] INFO [Config] 生成运行时配置成功
[2026-07-14 11:11:47.302] INFO [Config] 开始验证配置
[2026-07-14 11:11:47.586] INFO [Validate] 使用内核: verge-mihomo
[2026-07-14 11:11:49.885] INFO [Validate] 验证成功
[2026-07-14 11:11:49.894] INFO [Core] Starting core in service mode
[2026-07-14 11:11:50.433] INFO [Service] 服务成功启动核心
```

The service log says the core pipe and mixed proxy port are both listening:

```log
[2026-07-14 11:11:50.983] time="2026-07-14T11:11:50.979959200+08:00" level=info msg="RESTful API pipe listening at: \\.\pipe\verge-mihomo"
[2026-07-14 11:11:50.987] time="2026-07-14T11:11:50.979959200+08:00" level=info msg="Mixed(http+socks) proxy listening at: [::]:7897"
```

The service log also shows traffic being routed successfully:

```log
[2026-07-14 11:12:33.556] time="2026-07-14T11:12:33.555654000+08:00" level=info msg="[TCP] 127.0.0.1:36539 --> api.ip.sb:443 match Match using <proxy-group>[<selected-node>]"
[2026-07-14 11:12:55.834] time="2026-07-14T11:12:55.834526500+08:00" level=info msg="[TCP] 127.0.0.1:25163 --> chromewebstore.googleapis.com:443 match DomainKeyword(google) using <proxy-group>[<selected-node>]"
[2026-07-14 11:15:03.556] time="2026-07-14T11:15:03.556160100+08:00" level=info msg="[TCP] 127.0.0.1:59224 --> safebrowsing.googleapis.com:443 match Domain(safebrowsing.googleapis.com) using DIRECT"
```

So the proxy engine is not dead. The UI still reports a core communication error.

### Runtime config observations

The generated `clash-verge.yaml` contains proxy groups and proxies:

```text
proxy_groups: 43
proxies: 51
```

Important controller-related fields:

```yaml
mixed-port: 7897
external-controller: ''
secret: set-your-secret
external-controller-pipe: \\.\pipe\verge-mihomo
proxies:
proxy-groups:
rules:
```

`verge.yaml` contains:

```yaml
enable_external_controller: false
enable_tun_mode: false
enable_system_proxy: true
enable_dns_settings: false
clash_core: verge-mihomo
```

Local HTTP controller test fails, expected because `external-controller` is empty:

```text
GET http://127.0.0.1:9097/proxies
=> unable to connect to remote server
```

This leaves only the named pipe control path. The core says that pipe is listening, but the frontend still cannot display core state.

### Reproduction steps

I do not yet have a minimal clean-machine reproducer, but this is the sequence that led to the current state:

1. Use Clash Verge Rev 2.5.1 on Windows.
2. Enable system proxy.
3. Use service mode with `verge-mihomo`.
4. Have DNS overwrite enabled initially, then disable it.
5. Keep TUN disabled.
6. Reboot Windows.
7. Open Clash Verge Rev.
8. Observe that the core starts successfully and traffic is routed, but the UI still shows core communication error and empty proxy groups.

### What I tried

- Restarting Clash Verge.
- Rebooting Windows.
- Disabling TUN / virtual NIC.
- Disabling DNS overwrite.
- Removing fake-ip from the final generated config by disabling DNS overwrite.
- Checking that only one `verge-mihomo.exe` remains after reboot.
- Checking that `7897` is no longer a duplicate bind conflict after reboot.
- Checking that the generated config really contains proxies and proxy groups.

### Suspected cause

After reboot, this no longer looks like a stale-process/port-conflict issue. The core is alive and forwarding traffic.

The likely problem is in the control channel between the frontend and the core when running in service mode with only:

```yaml
external-controller-pipe: \\.\pipe\verge-mihomo
external-controller: ''
```

Possible root causes:

1. The frontend cannot access the named pipe created by the service/core process, even though the core reports that the pipe is listening.
2. The frontend has no HTTP external controller fallback because `enable_external_controller: false` generates `external-controller: ''`.
3. The UI treats a pipe/API read failure as a generic core communication error even though the core is running and routing traffic.
4. Service mode + LocalSystem pipe permissions may be involved.

### Suggested fixes / improvements

1. When running in service mode, ensure the named pipe ACL allows the desktop user / frontend process to read core API responses.
2. Consider enabling a local HTTP external controller fallback by default in service mode, or fall back to HTTP if the pipe API fails.
3. Make `enable_external_controller: false` behavior safer: if the UI depends on core API access, disabling HTTP controller should not leave the frontend with only a fragile pipe path.
4. Improve the UI error message to distinguish:
   - core process not running
   - mixed port bind failure
   - named pipe permission denied
   - named pipe timeout
   - HTTP controller disabled/unreachable
   - config validation failure
5. In the Proxy/Home pages, if proxy traffic is active but the control API read fails, report it as `control API unavailable` rather than `core communication error`.

### Screenshots

I have screenshots showing:

- Home page: no active proxy node + core communication error.
- System proxy enabled while proxy groups are empty.
- TUN disabled / auto-route disabled / strict-route disabled.
- DNS overwrite page before and after identifying that it was overriding script DNS.
- Proxy bypass containing `leetcode.cn;*.leetcode.cn`.

I am submitting via an API client that cannot directly upload the local screenshots as GitHub attachments. I can attach them in a follow-up comment if needed.

### Log

```log
[2026-07-14 11:11:47.191] INFO [Config] 生成运行时配置成功
[2026-07-14 11:11:47.302] INFO [Config] 开始验证配置
[2026-07-14 11:11:47.302] INFO [Validate] 生成临时配置文件用于验证
[2026-07-14 11:11:47.492] INFO [Validate] 开始验证配置文件: C:\Users\<user>\AppData\Roaming\io.github.clash-verge-rev.clash-verge-rev\clash-verge-check.yaml
[2026-07-14 11:11:47.586] INFO [Validate] 使用内核: verge-mihomo
[2026-07-14 11:11:47.618] INFO [Validate] 验证目录: C:\Users\<user>\AppData\Roaming\io.github.clash-verge-rev.clash-verge-rev
[2026-07-14 11:11:49.885] INFO [Validate] -------- 验证结果 --------
[2026-07-14 11:11:49.885] INFO [Validate] 验证成功
[2026-07-14 11:11:49.885] INFO [Validate] -------- 验证结束 --------
[2026-07-14 11:11:49.885] INFO [Config] 配置验证成功
[2026-07-14 11:11:49.894] INFO [Service] 服务就绪，直接启动
[2026-07-14 11:11:49.894] INFO [Core] Starting core in service mode
[2026-07-14 11:11:49.961] INFO [Service] 正在尝试通过服务启动核心
[2026-07-14 11:11:50.366] INFO [Service] 服务已运行且版本匹配，直接使用
[2026-07-14 11:11:50.367] INFO [Service] 尝试使用现有服务启动核心
[2026-07-14 11:11:50.433] INFO [Service] 服务成功启动核心
[2026-07-14 11:11:50.983] time="2026-07-14T11:11:50.979959200+08:00" level=info msg="RESTful API pipe listening at: \\.\pipe\verge-mihomo"
[2026-07-14 11:11:50.987] time="2026-07-14T11:11:50.979959200+08:00" level=info msg="Mixed(http+socks) proxy listening at: [::]:7897"
[2026-07-14 11:12:33.556] time="2026-07-14T11:12:33.555654000+08:00" level=info msg="[TCP] 127.0.0.1:36539 --> api.ip.sb:443 match Match using <proxy-group>[<selected-node>]"
[2026-07-14 11:12:55.834] time="2026-07-14T11:12:55.834526500+08:00" level=info msg="[TCP] 127.0.0.1:25163 --> chromewebstore.googleapis.com:443 match DomainKeyword(google) using <proxy-group>[<selected-node>]"
[2026-07-14 11:15:03.556] time="2026-07-14T11:15:03.556160100+08:00" level=info msg="[TCP] 127.0.0.1:59224 --> safebrowsing.googleapis.com:443 match Domain(safebrowsing.googleapis.com) using DIRECT"
```

Earlier, before reboot, there was a duplicate process/port-conflict state:

```log
[2026-07-14 11:06:46.509] time="2026-07-14T11:06:46.509062600+08:00" level=error msg="External controller pipe listen error: open \\.\pipe\verge-mihomo: Access is denied."
[2026-07-14 11:06:46.512] time="2026-07-14T11:06:46.511902100+08:00" level=error msg="Start Mixed(http+socks) server error: listen tcp :7897: bind: Only one usage of each socket address (protocol/network address/port) is normally permitted."
```

After reboot, that duplicate bind error disappeared, but the UI problem remains.

附件是应用的日志。异常表现为：开了TUN也无法正常代理，系统dns被设置成114.114.114.114，但我的dns配置中，是没有这个地址的。
dns配置：
```yaml
dns:
  enable: true
  cache-algorithm: lru
  prefer-h3: false
  respect-rules: true
  listen: 127.0.0.1:53
  ipv6: false

    - '+.push.apple.com'

    - https://doh.example.org/query
```

title: [BUG] Windows v2.5.1 手动进入轻量模式后崩溃并可能无法再次启动（0xc000001d / 0xc000041d）
author: Tomodad
body:
### 问题描述 / Describe the bug

在 Windows 11 x64 上，Clash Verge Rev v2.5.1 正常运行时，手动点击首页的“轻量模式”后，主窗口按设计被销毁，但随后 clash-verge.exe 本体发生崩溃。崩溃后再次点击程序图标，曾出现无法打开、闪退或没有主界面的情况。

Windows Error Reporting 记录到同一故障偏移处的异常：

- 0xc000001d (illegal instruction)
- 0xc000041d (fatal user callback exception)
- Faulting application/module: clash-verge.exe 2.5.1.0
- Fault offset: 0x00000000003515bd

这次有明确的轻量模式触发点，与一般的随机闪退不同。

### 复现步骤 / To Reproduce

1. 在 Windows 11 x64 上启动 Clash Verge Rev v2.5.1。
2. 保持以下状态：
   - TUN：关闭
   - 系统代理：关闭
   - 自动轻量模式：关闭
   - Mihomo 使用 sidecar 模式
3. 在首页手动点击“轻量模式”。
4. 主窗口立即消失。
5. 再次通过快捷方式启动 Clash Verge，可能无法显示窗口、闪退或无响应。

### 实际结果 / Actual behavior

应用日志中紧邻的两条记录为：

~~~log
[2026-07-13 01:50:36.335] INFO [Lightweight] 轻量模式已开启
[2026-07-13 01:50:36.335] INFO [Window] 窗口已摧毁
~~~

随后一次重新启动能够完成配置验证、创建窗口和启动 sidecar：

~~~log
[2026-07-13 01:52:57.315] INFO [Config] 配置验证成功
[2026-07-13 01:52:57.316] INFO [Window] 开始创建主窗口, should_create=true
[2026-07-13 01:52:57.317] INFO [Window] 新窗口创建成功，等待前端渲染后显示
[2026-07-13 01:52:57.317] INFO [Core] Starting core in sidecar mode
~~~

但 Windows 在 01:53:50–01:53:51 记录到：

~~~text
Faulting application: clash-verge.exe, version 2.5.1.0
Faulting module: clash-verge.exe, version 2.5.1.0
Exception code: 0xc000001d / 0xc000041d
Fault offset: 0x00000000003515bd
~~~

之后在 01:56:30 再次启动时成功恢复。

### 期望结果 / Expected behavior

进入轻量模式后可以销毁或隐藏主窗口，但后台进程应保持健康；之后从托盘或快捷方式重新打开时，应可靠地重新创建主窗口，而不是崩溃或无法再次启动。

### 初步诊断 / Investigation

只读检查得到以下结果：

- 崩溃模块是 clash-verge.exe 本身，不是 verge-mihomo.exe 或 msedgewebview2.exe。
- 成功恢复后只有一个 clash-verge.exe 和一个由它启动的 verge-mihomo.exe，没有重复 GUI、双内核或 Clash Windows 服务。
- Mihomo 能正常验证配置并监听 127.0.0.1:7897。
- WebView2 子进程在恢复后的实例中均正常响应。
- 崩溃后的节点错误是一次启动瞬间的代理服务器域名 DNS 解析失败；稍后该域名能够正常解析，节点端口也能连接，因此更像崩溃后的次生状态，不像主程序崩溃根因。

从日志时序看，值得检查的路径是手动进入轻量模式时：

entry_lightweight_mode() -> WindowManager::destroy_main_window()

以及随后从快捷方式或托盘重新创建主窗口、恢复 WebView 和 sidecar 状态的生命周期处理。

这不是对根因的最终断言，但现有证据将故障范围指向 Windows 下的 GUI/window lifecycle，而不是节点配置或 Mihomo 数据面。

可能相关但触发条件不同的问题：#6811、#6941。#6941 中也报告过 0xc000001d / 0xc000041d 和下次启动失败；本次的区别是能够明确由“手动进入轻量模式”触发，且当时系统代理和自动轻量模式均为关闭状态。

### 软件版本 / CVR Version

~~~text
Clash Verge Rev: 2.5.1 x64
Mihomo Meta: v1.19.25 windows amd64
WebView2 Runtime: 144.0.3719.93
~~~

### 操作系统 / OS

- [x] Windows
- [ ] Linux
- [ ] macOS

### 操作系统版本 / OS Version

~~~text
Microsoft Windows 11 家庭版 中文版
Version: 10.0.26200 (Build 26200)
Architecture: x64
CPU: Intel Core i9-14900HX
~~~

title: [BUG] Inline type proxy-provider cannot display correctly and fails speed tests.
author: TWO666
body: ### 问题描述 / Describe the bug When adding an `inline` type proxy-provider in the `Global Extend Config`, the frontend UI displays it as `Unknown` and latency tests fail (resulting in `Timeout`), even though the network connection works normally. In contrast, `http` type proxy-providers display correctly, pass latency tests, and connect without any issues. **Actual behavior:** Displays `Unknown` **Expected behavior:** Displays `proxy-provider name` `Vless` `UDP` `XUDP` ### 软件版本 / CVR Version ```text Clash.Verge_2.5.2+autobuild.0712.604fdb9_amd64.deb ``` ### 复现步骤 / To Reproduce 1. Add inline type provider `Global Extend Config` ```yaml proxy-providers: custom: type: inline payload: - name: A_CUSTOM_1 type: vless server: xxx port: xxx network: tcp uuid: xxx tls: true udp: true flow: xtls-rprx-vision servername: xxx client-fingerprint: chrome skip-cert-verify: false reality-opts: public-key: xxx short-id: xxx ``` 2. Observe UI 3. Click `Check` under `A_CUSTOM_1` ### 操作系统 / OS - [ ] Windows - [x] Linux - [ ] MacOS ### 操作系统版本 / OS Version Ubuntu 24.04/GNOME/X11 ### 日志(勿上传日志文件，请粘贴日志内容) / Log (Do not upload the log file, paste the log content directly) ```log After clicking 'Check', it seems that no relevant logs appear. title: [Feature] Adding the `.msixbundle` installer
author: linghengqian
body:
### 功能描述 / Feature description

- Adding the `.msixbundle` installer.
- I am aware of the existence of https://github.com/clash-verge-rev/clash-verge-rev/issues/615 , but I am unable to respond to that issue. The related issue has been locked.
- As one way to resolve https://github.com/tauri-apps/tauri/issues/4818 , https://github.com/Choochmeque/tauri-windows-bundle supports building `.msixbundle` artifacts via Tauri.

### 使用场景 / Use case

- Based on the actions described in https://github.com/PowerShell/PowerShell/discussions/27292 , Microsoft has decided that the `.msixbundle` format will replace the `.exe` and `.msi` formats for installers.

### 适用系统 / Target OS

- [x] windows
- [ ] macos
- [ ] linux

title: 支持通过 USB 将代理网络共享给 iPhone（配合 macOS 内容缓存）
author: zmc1998
body:
### 功能描述 / Feature description

希望 Clash Verge Rev 在 macOS 上能够支持（或提供配置指引）将代理网络共享给通过 USB 连接的 iOS 设备。

macOS 自带「内容缓存」功能（系统设置 → 通用 → 共享 → 内容缓存 → 勾选"互联网连接"），可以通过 USB 将 Mac 的网络共享给 iPhone，此时 iPhone 即使关闭 Wi-Fi 和蜂窝数据也能上网。

但目前不确定 Clash Verge Rev 的 TUN 模式 / 系统代理模式下，经由 USB 共享出去的流量是否会被正确接管并走代理。

期望的效果：


Mac 开启 Clash Verge Rev（TUN 模式）
Mac 开启内容缓存的"共享互联网连接"
iPhone 通过 USB 连接 Mac
iPhone 上所有 App 的流量 → USB → Mac → 经过 Clash Verge Rev 代理 → 外网


如果现有版本已支持此流程，希望能在文档中补充相关说明和配置步骤；如果 TUN 模式未能捕获 USB 共享的流量，希望能增加对此场景的支持。

### 使用场景 / Use case

场景：iPhone 无法安装代理客户端，需要借助 Mac 代理访问外网

具体情况：


iPhone 上没有安装 Shadowrocket / Surge 等代理 App（付费限制 / 无外区 Apple ID / 公司设备 MDM 限制等）
所处环境没有可用的 Wi-Fi 网络，或出于安全考虑不能开启 Wi-Fi
Mac 上已通过 Clash Verge Rev 正常使用代理
希望仅通过一根 USB 线，让 iPhone 也能共享 Mac 的代理网络


Android 设备可以通过 adb reverse + VpnService 轻松实现类似功能，但 iOS 生态缺少对应方案。macOS 的「内容缓存 → 共享互联网连接」是目前最接近的官方途径，如果 Clash Verge Rev 的 TUN 模式能正确代理这部分流量，将完美解决这一需求。

这个功能对以下用户群体很有价值：


无法在 iPhone 上安装代理 App 的用户
需要批量为 iOS 设备提供代理网络的开发者 / 测试人员
出差 / 旅行中只有有线网络的场景

### 适用系统 / Target OS

- [ ] windows
- [x] macos
- [ ] linux

title: [BUG] 手动代理选择组无法对单个节点进行测速
author: RingoCaviar
body: ### 问题描述 / Describe the bug 手动选择组中的节点点击数字无法对单个节点进行延迟检测了，鼠标指上去不是可点击状态 但是其他的分流组可以对其中的某个规则集合进行延迟测试，不知道是不是和分组的type有关，但是之前的老版本是可以单个节点测试的 ### 软件版本 / CVR Version ```text Clash.Verge_2.5.2+autobuild.0708.406c0ab_x64-setup ``` ### 复现步骤 / To Reproduce 安装指定版本的clash verge 进行单节点延迟测试 ### 操作系统 / OS - [x] Windows - [ ] Linux - [ ] MacOS ### 操作系统版本 / OS Version 操作系统名称 Microsoft Windows 11 专业工作站版 版本 10.0.26200 版本 26200 ### 日志(勿上传日志文件，请粘贴日志内容) / Log (Do not upload the log file, paste the log content directly) ```log 无 ```

title: [Feature] 节点布局添加紧凑模式
author: veizei-K
body: ### 功能描述 / Feature description 有时候节点特别多，所以会超出屏幕显示；另一方面每个节点中间都是大片空白，我觉得可以删除，让每个节点块整体变短，这样可以有效利用空间。 ### 使用场景 / Use case 查看节点 ### 适用系统 / Target OS - [x] windows - [ ] macos - [ ] linux

### 问题描述 / Describe the bug

Issues 5451 问题重现，[升级 Mihomo正式版 内核失败导致代理网络异常](https://github.com/clash-verge-rev/clash-verge-rev/issues/5451)

点击升级 Mihomo 正式版内核提示`Http Parse failed, connection closedbefore message completed`

此时代理失效，再次点击提示`Connection failed, 1/O error: No suchfile or directory (os error 2)`

切换至 Mihomo Alpha 内核代理恢复正常

切换回 Mihomo 正式版内核代理异常仍然存在

### 软件版本 / CVR Version

```text
v2.5.1
```

### 复现步骤 / To Reproduce

1. 点击升级 Mihomo 正式版内核提示`Http Parse failed, connection closedbefore message completed`
2. 再次点击提示`Connection failed, 1/O error: No suchfile or directory (os error 2)`
3. 重启正式版内核无法恢复访问，切换为预览版内核恢复访问
4. 卸载app重新安装，恢复访问，再次点击升级内核情况复现

### 操作系统 / OS

- [ ] Windows
- [ ] Linux
- [x] MacOS

### 操作系统版本 / OS Version

Sequoia 15.7.7 (24G720)

title: [BUG] 全局扩展脚本修改 config.dns 未能生效
author: self4m
body:
### 问题描述 / Describe the bug

日常开发使用 OrbStack 和 Tailscale，其中：

* OrbStack 基于 mDNS 提供 `*.orb.local` 域名解析；
* Tailscale 通过虚拟网卡 提供 `*.ts.net` 域名访问。

由于这些域名依赖本地网络环境或专用 DNS 解析，因此访问时需要绕过代理，并使用对应的 DNS 解析方式。

尝试通过「全局扩展脚本」修改 DNS 配置中的 `fake-ip-filter` 和 `nameserver-policy`，以实现：

* `*.orb.local` 使用本机 DNS 解析；
* `*.ts.net` 指定 Tailscale DNS（100.100.100.100）解析；
* 相关流量使用 `DOMAIN-SUFFIX` 匹配 `DIRECT` 规则。

尝试了以下两种写法，但均未能将修改后的 DNS 配置应用到当前运行配置中：


方式一：直接修改嵌套配置

```javascript
  if (!Array.isArray(config.dns["fake-ip-filter"])) {
    config.dns["fake-ip-filter"] = [];
  }
  if (!config.dns["nameserver-policy"] || typeof config.dns["nameserver-policy"] !== 'object') {
    config.dns["nameserver-policy"] = {};
  }

  const FakeIPFilterArray = [
    "+.orb.local",
    "+.ts.net"
  ];
  config.dns["fake-ip-filter"].push(...FakeIPFilterArray);
  const tailscaleDomain = "+.ts.net";
  config.dns["nameserver-policy"]["+.ts.net"] = ["100.100.100.100"];
```

方式二：重新构造 DNS 配置后赋值

```javascript
  const dns = config.dns;
  const fakeIpFilter = dns["fake-ip-filter"] || [];
  fakeIpFilter.push(
    "+.orb.local",
    "+.ts.net"
  );
  dns["fake-ip-filter"] = fakeIpFilter;
  const nameserverPolicy = dns["nameserver-policy"] || {};
  nameserverPolicy["+.ts.net"] = [
    "100.100.100.100"
  ];
  dns["nameserver-policy"] = nameserverPolicy;
  config.dns = dns;
```

完成配置后，扩展脚本中的其他配置正常执行，运行日志未出现异常。但即使重启应用，相关 DNS 配置修改仍未反映到最终运行配置中。

通过「DNS 覆写」功能，在 `nameserver-policy` 中添加相同配置后，发现修改可以正常应用到运行配置。

经过多次验证，怀疑全局扩展脚本能成功完成 `config.dns` 中配置的修改，或是配置在其他设置中被覆盖，导致脚本修改未能生效。

### 软件版本 / CVR Version

```text
v2.5.1
```

### 复现步骤 / To Reproduce

1. 在 全局扩展脚本 中添加方案一或方案二的脚本

方式一：直接修改嵌套配置

```javascript
  if (!Array.isArray(config.dns["fake-ip-filter"])) {
    config.dns["fake-ip-filter"] = [];
  }
  if (!config.dns["nameserver-policy"] || typeof config.dns["nameserver-policy"] !== 'object') {
    config.dns["nameserver-policy"] = {};
  }

  const FakeIPFilterArray = [
    "+.orb.local",
    "+.ts.net"
  ];
  config.dns["fake-ip-filter"].push(...FakeIPFilterArray);
  const tailscaleDomain = "+.ts.net";
  config.dns["nameserver-policy"]["+.ts.net"] = ["100.100.100.100"];
```

方式二：重新构造 DNS 配置后赋值

```javascript
  const dns = config.dns;
  const fakeIpFilter = dns["fake-ip-filter"] || [];
  fakeIpFilter.push(
    "+.orb.local",
    "+.ts.net"
  );
  dns["fake-ip-filter"] = fakeIpFilter;
  const nameserverPolicy = dns["nameserver-policy"] || {};
  nameserverPolicy["+.ts.net"] = [
    "100.100.100.100"
  ];
  dns["nameserver-policy"] = nameserverPolicy;
  config.dns = dns;
```


2. 保存后查看配置并测试，发现修改未生效

3. 重启应用查看配置并测试，发现修改未生效

4. 清除修改并重启应用，通过「DNS 覆写」功能，在 `nameserver-policy` 中配置：

```text
+.ts.net=100.100.100
```

5. 查看配置并测试，发现修改已经生效

### 操作系统 / OS

- [ ] Windows
- [ ] Linux
- [x] MacOS

### 操作系统版本 / OS Version

Sequoia 15.7.7 (24G720)
